settings.custom_cta_heading: Need something made just for you?

settings.fact: Styling help when you need it

settings.heading: From our hands to your celebration.
settings.body: Aarus Creations brings together festive color, thoughtful details, and pieces made to be worn, styled, and remembered.

settings.question: How quickly will I receive a reply?
settings.answer: We typically reply within 24 hours on business days.

settings.question: Do you help with sizing?
settings.answer: Yes! Our styling team is happy to help you find the perfect fit. Just reach out via WhatsApp or email.

settings.question: Can I request a custom color or size?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Use our Custom Order form to request bespoke colors, specific measurements, or entirely new festive concepts.

settings.question: How can I track my order?
settings.answer: Once shipped, you’ll receive an email with your tracking number. You can also message us your order number for a quick update.

settings.question: What is your exchange policy?
settings.answer: We accept exchanges on standard sizes within 7 days of delivery. Custom orders are made exclusively for you and cannot be exchanged.

settings.question: Do you offer styling suggestions?
settings.answer: Yes! We love putting together complete festive looks, from the garment to the matching accessories.

settings.heading: Show us your Aarus moment.
settings.body: Tag us in your festive looks, twirls, and celebration-ready styling.
